steps.title: Apply the conversion factor
steps.content:
Since 1 mile equals 1,760 yards, converting 20.300 miles per hour to yards per hour requires multiplying:
$$20.300 \text{ miles/hour} \times 1,760 \text{ yards/mile} = 20.300 \times 1,760 \text{ yards/hour}$$

steps.title: Calculate the product
steps.content:
Break down the multiplication: $20 \times 1,760 = 35,200$ and $0.300 \times 1,760 = 528$.
Therefore: $35,200 + 528 = 35,728$ yards per hour.
